_comment: Copilot mirror of the Cursor `beforeShellExecution` git-hygiene gate
(.cursor/hooks.json). Blocks agent-made git commits until the git-hygiene
skill has run. The scanner re-checks on stdin and fails open. Matcher regex
is kept identical to the Cursor side for parity; note Copilot PreToolUse
matches tool invocations, so the scanner's own re-check is the real guard.
